fields.name: Classic Soft Scrambled Eggs on Sourdough
fields.short_description: Fluffy, buttery soft-scrambled eggs served over toasted sourdough bread with a sprinkle of fresh chives.
fields.meal_suggestion: Whisk three large eggs with a splash of cream and a pinch of salt. Melt butter in a non-stick pan over low heat and gently scramble the eggs until just set and creamy. Serve immediately over a thick slice of toasted sourdough, garnished with finely chopped chives and cracked black pepper.
fields.nutrition_note: Eggs provide high-quality protein and choline; sourdough offers a lower glycemic index carbohydrate source; chives add vitamin K. A classic, high-protein start to the day.
